meaning: n.狮子座的一等星,(熔矿中产生的)金属渣
examples: Leo's royal star Regulus and red planet Mars appear in a colorful pairing just above the horizon in this starry skyscape.
Regulus was the younger brother of Sirius Black.
Regulus is the brightest star in the constellation Leo.
Regulus: Advanced Vehicle Operating System for intelligent autonomy to enable coordinated fleet operations.
Regulus recently published some very intriguing data with miR-21 in cancer and fibrosis models (the subject of their earlier deal with Sanofi), as well as miR-33 in lipid biology.
